---
name: Docs improvement
about: Suggest a documentation fix or improvement.
title: "[Docs] "
labels: ["documentation"]
assignees: []
---

## Summary

What is unclear, missing, outdated, or poorly structured?

## Location

Which file or section needs work?

## Suggested change

Describe the wording, structure, or examples you want to improve.

## Why this matters

Explain how this would make the repo easier to understand or use.

## Acceptance signal

What should be clearer once this is done? For example: a first-time reader can follow the setup path, a contributor can find the right doc faster, or an outdated section is removed.

## Scope notes

Say whether this looks like a small wording fix, a structural rewrite, or a missing example. Maintainers can use that to decide whether to tag it `good first issue` or `help wanted`.
